title: Find A Tote By Tote Number In The Container Section
summary: Use the RMS container section to search for a tote by tote number so the system moves the map to the tote's current location in the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to locate where a tote is currently represented in the system by entering its tote number in the container section and reviewing the map location the system navigates to.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a procedure for tote swap, tote removal, or tote re-add actions; this source mentions those actions but does not provide enough procedural detail here to extract them safely as steps.
safety_notes: Use only the tote lookup behavior supported by this source.
Do not infer or perform swap, remove, or re-add recovery actions from this segment alone.

system_preconditions: The tote number to be searched is available to the user.

visual_references.description: Training video frame covering rack location and container lookup concepts, including tote lookup from the container section.
Container Selection screen showing tote presence indicators and tote/location lookup concepts.
Container Selection view showing tote lookup and rack/container color indicators.

steps.title: Open the container section
steps.purpose: Access the interface area where tote lookup is performed.
steps.instruction: Open the container section in the RMS interface.
steps.expected_result: The container section is visible and ready for tote number entry.
steps.healthy_condition: The container section is open and the tote entry/search area is available.
steps.failure_condition: The container section is not accessible or the tote entry/search area is not visible.

actions.label: Open container section
actions.exact_action: Open the container section in the RMS interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container section area used for tote lookup.
Container Selection screen and the area where tote or location lookup is performed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the container section cannot be opened or the lookup area is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can find a tote by typing in the tote number on this container section, and it will take you to the part of the map where that tote's been added or wherever that tote is in the system.

steps.title: Enter the tote number
steps.purpose: Provide the system with the tote identifier to search.
steps.instruction: Enter the tote number into the container section search field.
steps.expected_result: The tote number is entered in the container section lookup field.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended tote number is visible in the search field.
steps.failure_condition: The tote number cannot be entered or the wrong tote number is entered.

actions.label: Type tote number
actions.exact_action: Enter the tote number into the container section search field.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The tote number entry area in the container section.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the tote number is unavailable or cannot be entered.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can find a tote by typing in the tote number on this container section, and it will take you to the part of the map where that tote's been added or wherever that tote is in the system.

steps.title: Run the tote lookup
steps.purpose: Trigger the system behavior that navigates the map to the tote's current system location.
steps.instruction: Submit or use the lookup function so the system navigates to that tote's location on the map.
steps.expected_result: The system takes the user to the part of the map where the tote is currently shown in the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The map moves to the tote's current system location.
steps.failure_condition: The map does not move, or the tote is not shown in the system as expected.

actions.label: Submit tote lookup
actions.exact_action: Submit or use the lookup function so the system navigates to that tote's location on the map.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The map behavior after tote lookup, where the system takes the user to the tote's location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop if the lookup does not navigate to a tote location.
Escalate if the tote is not found where expected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can find a tote by typing in the tote number on this container section, and it will take you to the part of the map where that tote's been added or wherever that tote is in the system.

steps.title: Observe the mapped tote location
steps.purpose: Confirm where the tote is currently represented in the system.
steps.instruction: Observe the map area the system takes you to and identify where the tote is shown in the system.
steps.expected_result: The user can identify the tote's current system location on the map.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote location is visible and identifiable on the map.
steps.failure_condition: The tote location is unclear, missing, or inconsistent with the lookup result.

actions.label: Review mapped location
actions.exact_action: Observe the map area the system takes you to and identify where the tote is shown in the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The part of the map where the tote has been added or is currently shown in the system.
Container selection map indicators and tote/rack display cues.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the tote cannot be identified on the map after lookup.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can find a tote by typing in the tote number on this container section, and it will take you to the part of the map where that tote's been added or wherever that tote is in the system.

steps.title: Compare to expected location if needed
steps.purpose: Check whether the system location matches the expected physical or rack location when investigating a mismatch.
steps.instruction: If needed, compare the located tote position to the expected physical location or expected rack.
steps.expected_result: The user determines whether the system location matches the expected location.
steps.healthy_condition: The located tote position matches the expected physical location or expected rack.
steps.failure_condition: The tote is not found where expected or the system location does not match the expected location.

actions.label: Compare expected versus system location
actions.exact_action: If needed, compare the located tote position to the expected physical location or expected rack.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The located tote position on the map for comparison to the expected rack or physical location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the tote is not found where expected.
Record the mismatch if the system location does not match the expected location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: You can find a tote by typing in the tote number on this container section, and it will take you to the part of the map where that tote's been added or wherever that tote is in the system.

success_criteria: The tote number can be entered in the container section.
The system takes the user to the part of the map where the tote is currently represented in the system.
The user can identify the tote's current system location.
healthy_conditions: The tote lookup accepts the tote number.
The map moves to the tote's current system location.
The located tote position matches the expected location when comparison is needed.
failure_conditions: The container section or lookup field is not accessible.
The tote number cannot be entered or searched.
The map does not navigate to a tote location.
The tote is not found where expected.
The source does not provide enough detail to proceed into swap, remove, or re-add actions.
escalation_guidance: If the tote is not found where expected, record the mismatch and continue with a separate source-backed recovery procedure if available.
Do not perform swap, remove, or re-add actions from this runbook because this segment does not provide enough procedural detail to support them safely.
